title: TMF630 Search Config
description: Configuration for the TMF630 QueryDSL search UI component. Supports single-context (flat) or multi-context format.

FilterOperator.description: TMF630 QueryDSL filter operator. 22 operators total.

FieldConfigType.description:
Field data type. Determines default operators, input rendering, and wire format.
- text: free-form string
- numeric: integer or decimal
- enum: fixed set of values (dropdown)
- email: text with email validation
- url: text with URL validation
- date: Java LocalDate → YYYY-MM-DD
- dateTime: Java LocalDateTime → YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss
- offsetDateTime: Java OffsetDateTime → YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss+ZZ:ZZ
- instant: Java Instant → UTC ISO-8601

DateDisplayFormat.description:
Controls how the date/time picker is rendered.
- "date": shows date-only picker (YYYY-MM-DD). When backend stores time (dateTime/offsetDateTime/instant), eq is auto-expanded to gte(00:00)/lt(nextDay:00:00).
- "datetime": shows date + time picker.

OperatorPreset.description:
Named operator preset. Selects a predefined set of operators.
- text-search: eq, ne, contains, containsi, startswith, startswithi, endswith, endswithi, in, nin
- text-exact: eq, ne, eqi, nei, in, nin
- selection: eq, ne, in, nin
- date-range: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, between
- numeric: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, between, in, nin

displayName.description: Label shown to the user in the dropdown.

serverValue.description: Value sent to the backend in the query parameter.

required.description: If true, the field cannot be left empty.

pattern.description: JavaScript regular expression the value must match.

patternMessage.description: Custom error message when the pattern does not match.

type.description:
Field data type. Determines default operators, input rendering, and wire format.
- text: free-form string (default)
- numeric: integer or decimal
- enum: fixed set of values (dropdown)
- email: text with email validation
- url: text with URL validation
- date: Java LocalDate → YYYY-MM-DD
- dateTime: Java LocalDateTime → YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss
- offsetDateTime: Java OffsetDateTime → YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss+ZZ:ZZ
- instant: Java Instant → UTC ISO-8601

displayName.description: Label shown in the UI. Auto-derived from the field key (camelCase → Title Case) if omitted.

displayFormat.description:
Only for temporal types (date, dateTime, offsetDateTime, instant). Controls whether the picker shows date-only or date+time.
- "date": date-only picker (YYYY-MM-DD). eq is auto-expanded to gte(00:00)/lt(nextDay:00:00) for timestamp types.
- "datetime": date + time picker.
Defaults: date→"date", dateTime/offsetDateTime/instant→"datetime".

displayPattern.description:
Custom date display pattern for temporal types. If omitted, inherits the context-level displayPattern.
Supported tokens: yyyy (4-digit year), yy (2-digit year), MM (month 01-12), dd (day 01-31), HH (hour 24h 00-23), hh (hour 12h 01-12), mm (minutes 00-59), ss (seconds 00-59), a (AM/PM).
Separators: /, ., -, space, : are all supported.
Examples: "dd/MM/yyyy", "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", "dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm:ss", "MM/dd/yyyy hh:mm a".

responseDisplayFormat.description:
Display format for table/response columns. Independent of the filter displayFormat.
Example: displayFormat="date" (filter shows date-only picker) + responseDisplayFormat="datetime" (table shows date+time).
If omitted, falls back to displayFormat.

values.description: Fixed enum options. Only valid for type: "enum". Each entry: { "displayName": "Label", "serverValue": "VALUE" }.

defaultOperator.description: Pre-selected operator when this field is chosen. If omitted, the first operator in the resolved list is used.

validation.description: Client-side validation rules applied to the input value.

nullable.description: If true, isnull/isnotnull operators are automatically appended to the operator list.

operatorSet.description:
Named operator preset. Overrides auto-derived operators from type. Overridden by explicit "operators" array.
- text-search: eq, ne, contains, containsi, startswith, startswithi, endswith, endswithi, in, nin
- text-exact: eq, ne, eqi, nei, in, nin
- selection: eq, ne, in, nin
- date-range: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, between
- numeric: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, between, in, nin

operators.description: Explicit list of allowed operators. Highest priority — overrides both operatorSet and auto-derived operators.

defaultField.description: Field name pre-selected by default when the search panel opens. Must match a key in 'fields'.

defaultOperator.description: Operator pre-selected by default for the default field.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE autocomplete and validation. Ignored at runtime.

fields.description: Map of field name → field configuration. Keys become the query parameter names (e.g. "createdOn" → createdOn.eq=...).

defaults.description: Default field and operator for this context.

responseFields.description: Fields to include in the API response (TMF630 'fields=' parameter). Omit to return all fields.

displayPattern.description:
Default date display pattern for all temporal fields in this context. Individual fields can override with their own displayPattern.
Supported tokens: yyyy, yy, MM, dd, HH, hh, mm, ss, a (AM/PM).
Examples: "dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm", "yyyy-MM-dd", "dd.MM.yyyy hh:mm a".

SingleContextConfig.description: Flat single-context format. Used when the application has only one search context.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE autocomplete and validation. Ignored at runtime.

contexts.description: Named search contexts. Use when a single app has multiple independent search pages (e.g. "transformations", "users").
